data.title: HAIKU's Touch Archive Project: Bringing artworks into conversation: Bringing artworks into conversation
data.authors: James Blustein, Ann-Barbara Graff, Nicola Raffaele Di Matteo
data.book: Proceedings of the 6th Workshop on Human Factors in Hypertext
data.description: We trace the development of our ideas about how hypertext can uniquely support galleries, libraries, archives and museums laying out the vision of our Touch Archive project. Our first steps arose from interviews with curators about what they wanted and needed in improving and expanding the types of their exhibits.
